result:
No overlap — the two spelling sets are disjoint. Here's the answer:

## 直接 #include "eloop.h" 的 .c 檔案

**共 117 個**,分兩種寫法(皆解析到同一個檔案 `src/utils/eloop.h`,因為 compile_commands.json 裡同時有 `-I.../src` 與 `-I.../src/utils`):

**A) `#include "eloop.h"`(59 個,位於 utils 目錄本身或使用相對路徑可直接解析的檔案)**
`src/drivers/`: driver_atheros.c, driver_bsd.c, driver_hostap.c, driver_ndis_.c, driver_ndis.c, driver_nl80211.c, driver_privsep.c, driver_wext.c, driver_wired.c, netlink.c
`src/eap_peer/`: eap_vendor_test.c
`src/eap_server/`: eap_server_wsc.c, eap_sim_db.c
`src/eapol_auth/`: eapol_auth_sm.c
`src/eapol_supp/`: eapol_supp_sm.c
`src/l2_packet/`: l2_packet_freebsd.c, l2_packet_linux.c, l2_packet_ndis.c, l2_packet_none.c, l2_packet_pcap.c, l2_packet_privsep.c, l2_packet_winpcap.c
`src/p2p/`: p2p.c
`src/pae/`: ieee802_1x_kay.c
`src/radius/`: radius_client.c, radius_server.c
`src/rsn_supp/`: peerkey.c, pmksa_cache.c, preauth.c, wpa.c
`src/utils/`: edit_readline.c, edit_simple.c, edit.c, eloop_win.c, eloop.c
`src/wps/`: http_client.c, http_server.c, httpread.c, wps_er_ssdp.c, wps_er.c, wps_upnp_ap.c, wps_upnp_event.c, wps_upnp_ssdp.c
`wpa_supplicant/`: bgscan_learn.c, bgscan_simple.c, ctrl_iface_named_pipe.c, ctrl_iface_udp.c, dbus/dbus_old.c, eapol_test.c, events.c, hs20_supplicant.c, main_winsvc.c, p2p_supplicant.c, preauth_test.c, tests/test_wpa.c, wpa_priv.c, wpa_supplicant.c, wpas_glue.c, wps_supplicant.c

**B) `#include "utils/eloop.h"`(58 個,位於 utils 之外、走 src 頂層相對路徑的檔案)**
`wpa_supplicant/`: wpa_cli.c, bss.c, scan.c, gas_query.c, offchannel.c, wmm_ac.c, mesh_rsn.c, sme.c, interworking.c, ctrl_iface_unix.c, ap.c, ctrl_iface.c, ibss_rsn.c, mesh.c, mesh_mpm.c, dbus/dbus_new_helpers.c, dbus/dbus_common.c
`src/crypto/`: random.c
`src/drivers/`: driver_macsec_qca.c, driver_nl80211_scan.c, rfkill.c, driver_nl80211_monitor.c, driver_nl80211_event.c
`src/ap/`: ap_list.c, wpa_auth.c, ieee802_11_ht.c, peerkey_auth.c, drv_callbacks.c, ieee802_11.c, tkip_countermeasures.c, gas_serv.c, sta_info.c, accounting.c, wpa_auth_ft.c, iapp.c, vlan_init.c, wps_hostapd.c, hostapd.c, hw_features.c, preauth_auth.c, pmksa_cache_auth.c, bss_load.c, wnm_ap.c, vlan_util.c, ieee802_1x.c, ieee802_11_auth.c
`src/pae/`: ieee802_1x_cp.c, ieee802_1x_secy_ops.c
`src/utils/`: browser-android.c, utils_module_tests.c, browser-wpadebug.c, browser-system.c
`src/radius/`: radius_das.c
`src/wps/`: wps_registrar.c
`src/p2p/`: p2p_go_neg.c
`src/rsn_supp/`: tdls.c
`src/fst/`: fst.c, fst_session.c

兩組檔名彼此沒有重疊(用 `comm` 驗證過),所以總數 = 59 + 58 = **117**。

## 是否有 header 透過 transitive 方式再帶入 eloop.h?

用 `grep -l '#include ".*eloop\.h"' **/*.h` 掃過整個專案的 `.h` 檔,**結果是空的 — 沒有任何 header 檔本身 #include eloop.h**。也就是說 wpa_supplicant/hostapd 的常見共用 header(如 `includes.h`、`wpa_supplicant_i.h`、`hostapd_i.h` 等)都不轉引 `eloop.h`。

**結論:直接 include 集合(117)與透過任何 header 的 transitive closure(0)完全不相符 —— 因為根本不存在後者。** 換句話說,eloop.h 在整個 codebase 中沒有間接引入路徑,任何 `.c` 檔要用到 eloop 的宣告都必須自己直接 `#include`。這 117 個直接引用檔案就是唯一的引用集合,不存在「LSP/grep 直接數出來的數字比實際少」的情況。

方法說明:此問題屬於 skill 中明確標註「無 LSP 原生操作」的類型(檔案級 #include 關係),因此全程使用 grep 完成,並交叉核對兩種相對路徑寫法與 header 側掃描以確認無遺漏。
